claims.claim: M&T Bankは長期的な既存顧客との関係深化を通じた貸出成長を優先し、新規顧客開拓ではなく「関係の深化」を成長ドライバーとする保守的な与信文化を維持している
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CFO発言）: 'predominantly, additional credit with existing relationships that we've had for a very, very long time... it's not like we're collecting lots of new customers. I think our existing relationships are putting money to work.' / 'the existing customers where the size of their credits are increasing.'

evidence_sources.speaker: René Jones

claims.claim: M&Tはミッドアトランティック・ニューヨーク地域に特化した地域密着型の商業銀行として、地域経済・顧客企業に深く根ざした与信判断能力を持っている
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CFO発言）: 'things going well... on all fronts. Credit quality, everything seems to be going very nicely.' / 'what stands out to me is the mid-Atlantic... loan growth after quite a few quarters... growth we saw would be in health care and health care-associated type businesses... broad-based.'

claims.claim: BSA/AML（銀行秘密法・マネーロンダリング防止）コンプライアンスインフラへの大規模投資が、将来のM&A（Hudson City Bancorp買収）完了後の統合基盤を強化し、競合が同等投資なしには実現できない規制対応能力を構築している
claims.evidence: Q4 2014 Prepared Remarks（CFO発言）: 'We made excellent progress on our critical initiatives to strengthen M&T's BSA/AML compliance and overall risk management infrastructure. And while the targeted investments that we made moderated our return on tangible common equity to a shade below 14% for the year, taking these steps now positions M&T well for the change to banking environments.'

evidence_sources.speaker: René Jones

claims.claim: コア機関の健全性維持を最優先とする「保守的な与信規律」が、競合が基準を下げて競争激化する環境でも信用コストを歴史的低水準に保つリスク管理文化として機能している
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Prepared Remarks（CFO発言）: 'Net charge-offs remained at historical low levels' / Q&A: 'we've been pretty disciplined throughout... from time to time, when we get together, you'll see some regions feel a little bit less pressure than others... competitive pressure was relatively intense.' 保守的与信姿勢の維持を強調。

evidence_sources.speaker: René Jones

claims.claim: LIBORベースの変動金利商業貸出（C&I）への高比率が、金利上昇局面で競合地銀より素早くNIM（純利息マージン）を改善できる資産感応度構造をもたらしている
claims.evidence: Q2 2015 Q&A（CFO発言）: 'I think there's impact right away... we're very sensitive, particularly on the short end... so many of our loans, particularly commercial loans, C&I, are priced off of LIBOR, both the short-term LIBOR rates.'
